title: test_home_page_and_newsletter_subscription
description: Verify GET / returns 200 with home page content including products and community highlights. Verify POST / with valid name and email subscribes to newsletter and redirects with 302. Verify POST / with missing or invalid fields returns form error and remains on home page.

title: test_about_page_display
description: Verify GET /about/ returns 200 with about page content when available. Verify GET /about/ returns 404 when the page is unavailable.

title: test_shop_page_listing
description: Verify GET /shop/ returns 200 with all available products. Verify GET /shop/ returns 200 with empty product listing when no products are available.

title: test_product_detail_page
description: Verify GET /p/{pid}/ with valid product ID returns 200 with product details. Verify GET /p/{pid}/ with non-existent product ID returns 404 Product not found.

title: test_contact_form_submission_and_sanitization
description: Verify GET /contact/ returns 200 with contact form page. Verify POST /contact/ with valid name, email, and message redirects with 302 and success message. Verify POST /contact/ with invalid or incomplete fields redirects with 302 and error message. Verify POST /contact/ with HTML content in message is sanitized before processing.

title: test_cart_management_operations
description: Verify POST /cart/add/{pid}/ with valid product ID, size, and quantity adds item and redirects with 302. Verify POST /cart/add/{pid}/ with invalid product ID returns 404. Verify GET /cart/ returns 200 with cart items, totals, and count. Verify POST /cart/update/{item_id}/ with action increase updates quantity and returns 200 JSON with updated totals. Verify POST /cart/update/{item_id}/ with action decrease until zero removes item and returns 200 JSON. Verify GET /cart/remove/{item_id}/ removes item and redirects with 302.

title: test_razorpay_order_creation
description: Verify POST /payments/create-order/ with items in session cart returns 200 JSON with order_id, amount, currency, and key_id. Verify POST /payments/create-order/ with empty cart and valid product_id returns 200 JSON with fallback product order details. Verify POST /payments/create-order/ with invalid product_id returns 404. Verify POST /payments/create-order/ with malformed request data returns 400 error.

title: test_payment_verification_and_invoice_generation
description: Verify POST /payments/verify-payment/ with valid payment details returns 200 JSON success status and message. Verify POST /payments/verify-payment/ with invalid razorpay_signature returns 400 error. Verify POST /payments/verify-payment/ with unknown razorpay_order_id returns 404. Verify POST /payments/verify-payment/ after successful checkout clears cart data and generates invoice.

title: test_django_admin_access_control
description: Verify GET /admin/ with valid authenticated staff credentials returns 200 admin HTML page. Verify GET /admin/ without authentication denies access or redirects to login page.
